reviews.comment:
El lugar donde están las parrillas es un paraíso.Tranquilo,gente grande,sin música....lastima que esté tan sucio.Estvimos 13-02-2018.Hacia varios días que no lo limpiaban Incluso botellas vacías  y los tarros de basura llenos.Una verdadera lástima

(Translated by Google)
The place where the grills are is a paradise. Quiet, grown-ups, no music... it's a shame it's so dirty. We were there on February 13, 2018. It hadn't been cleaned for several days. Even empty bottles and garbage cans were full. A real shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnbGJXZVBREAE
